summary: Full E2E testing of Feature Batch 4: Vacancy 90-day window, Property marlins_decal_property toggle, Tenant marlins_decal + Airbnb parking. All 21 backend tests passed and all frontend feature flows verified.

minor.issue: Old MongoDB documents (created before feature) don't have marlins_decal_property field. New properties have it. Frontend handles with || false. Expected behavior, no action needed.

issues: Console warnings: 'Invalid prop data-state supplied to React.Fragment' - caused by Collapsible asChild used with <> (React.Fragment) in VacancyPage.js lines 217-247. Non-blocking warning but should be fixed by removing asChild from CollapsibleContent or wrapping children in a real HTML element.

action_items: Minor: Fix VacancyPage.js - CollapsibleContent asChild with React.Fragment causes console warnings. Remove asChild from CollapsibleContent or wrap with <tbody> instead of <>
critical_code_review_comments: VacancyPage.js: <CollapsibleContent asChild><></> passes data-state to React.Fragment which generates console warnings. Change asChild pattern or use a wrapping element.
Old MongoDB documents don't have marlins_decal_property field - frontend handles gracefully with || false. Could add a MongoDB migration to backfill, but not critical.
No missing data-testid attributes found for new feature elements.
find_upcoming_vacancies correctly uses days_ahead=90 (not months_ahead=3) - confirmed in code and backend test.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and cleaned up TEST_Marlins_Decal_Property, TEST_No_Marlins_Property and associated units/tenants. All cleaned up after tests.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/vacancy returns 200
Backend: upcoming_vacancies key present and is a list
Backend: All upcoming vacancies within 90-day window (not 3 months)
Backend: by_building sorted by building_id ascending (nulls last)
Backend: Vacancy response has by_building, by_unit_size, upcoming_vacancies keys
Backend: Property created with marlins_decal_property=True saves correctly
Backend: GET property returns marlins_decal_property=True (data persisted)
Backend: Property created with marlins_decal_property=False saves correctly
Backend: PUT property can toggle marlins_decal_property to True (verified with GET)
Backend: Properties list includes marlins_decal_property for newly created properties
Backend: Long-term tenant marlins_decal=True saved and returned
Backend: GET tenant preserves marlins_decal=True
Backend: Airbnb tenant parking info (parking + has_parking) saved correctly
Backend: Airbnb tenant marlins_decal=True saved correctly
Backend: PUT tenant can toggle marlins_decal to False (verified with GET)
Backend: Tenant list includes marlins_decal field
Backend: GET /api/calendar returns 200
Backend: /api/calendar has properties array
Backend: GET /api/calendar/timeline returns 200
Backend: Calendar timeline buildings sorted by building_id ascending
Backend: Existing 'Test Marlins Prop' has marlins_decal_property=True
Frontend: Property create dialog has 'Marlins Decal Property' toggle (data-testid=property-marlins-decal-toggle)
Frontend: 'Marlins Decal Property' badge shown in property details for marlins_decal_property=true property
Frontend: Vacancy page loads with title 'Vacancy'
Frontend: Vacancy 'By Building' tab shows buildings
Frontend: Upcoming Vacancies tab shows actual vacancies within 90-day window
Frontend: Tenant Airbnb mode shows 'Parking Info' field (data-testid=tenant-parking-airbnb)
Frontend: Tenant Airbnb mode shows 'Has parking spot' checkbox
Frontend: Tenant Long-term mode shows 'Parking Info' label
Frontend: Tenant Long-term mode shows 'Has parking spot' checkbox
Frontend: Marlins Decal checkbox hidden before selecting a property
Frontend: Marlins Decal checkbox hidden for non-Marlins property (1144)
Frontend: 'Assign Marlins Decal to Tenant' checkbox appears after selecting 'Test Marlins Prop'
Frontend: 'Assign Marlins Decal to Tenant' checkbox is clickable and toggles correctly
Frontend: Tenant detail dialog shows Parking info for long-term tenant
Frontend: Tenant edit dialog opens and shows Parking Info pre-filled
Frontend: Property edit dialog pre-fills Marlins Decal toggle as 'Yes' for existing marlins_decal_property=true property
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature Batch 4 fully tested and working: (1) Vacancy page uses 90-day window - verified in backend tests and UI. (2) Property marlins_decal_property toggle in create/edit dialog, badge in details view. (3) Tenant Airbnb parking field and Marlins Decal checkbox conditional on property flag. All 21 backend tests pass. Minor issue: VacancyPage Collapsible asChild with React.Fragment causes console warnings (non-blocking). Pre-existing 'Test Marlins Prop' (id: 69b99d5c2dc4f925a4cffb39) is in the DB with marlins_decal_property=true.
